name: Trade Union Membership
description: Membership in or affiliation with trade unions or labor organizations.

regulatory_basis.name: GDPR Article 9(1)
regulatory_basis.summary: Trade union membership is a special category of personal data.

includes: Union affiliation or specific union membership
excludes: General employment sector (e.g., 'works in manufacturing') without union inference
Professional association membership (e.g., 'AMA member') unless the association is a trade union
guidance: Primarily relevant in EU markets where GDPR treats this as a special category. Less commonly encountered in advertising targeting than other restricted attributes, but important for employment-vertical campaigns.
